---
title: "Awards"
---

# Scholarships & Awards

### 2025 – Present
Ernest F. Hollings Undergraduate Scholarship

### 2025 – 2027
UC Leadership Excellence through Advanced Degrees (UC LEADS)

### 2025 – Present
NOAA Climate Scholars Program Scholarship

### 2025 – Present
Undergraduate Koret Scholarship

### 2025
Western Association of Marine Laboratories Student Award

### 2025
Diversifying Ocean Sciences MISS Scholarship

### 2025
Hispanic Scholarship Foundation Scholar

### 2025
ESA SEEDS Undergraduate Conference Award

### 2025
ESA SEEDS Henry L. Gholz National Award

### 2024 – 2025
NSF ORCC Research Project (Award #2222524)

### 2024
UCSC CITRIS Initiative for Drone Education and Research (CIDER) Scholar

### 2024 – Present
William Beye Heald Scholarship

### 2024 – Present
Robert H. Bisno Endowed Scholarship

### 2023 – 2024
UCSC CAMINO Scholar
